title: Gatarn 220 Piece First Aid Kit Bag - Includes Eyewash, 2 x Cold (Ice) Packs, Emergency Blanket, Survival & Emergency Kit for Home, Car, Office, Caravan, Travel, Workplace and Sports
features: 220 Essential Items: first aid kit featuring 220 items, including extra‐strong metal scissors, an instant cold pack, a large emergency foil blanket, and a variety of high‐quality plasters for complete emergency care.

Compact & Portable: Designed to be sleek and portable, this kit fits easily in your home, kitchen, office, car, school, trailer, or caravan. It’s also perfect for on‐the‐go use during camping, hiking, backpacking, and other outdoor adventures.

Durable & Lightweight: Crafted with a robust, hard‐wearing outer bag that is built to last yet remains lightweight. Multiple compartments and extra storage allow you to organise supplies efficiently and add more when needed.

Accident-Ready Supplies: Includes essential items such as antiseptic towels, butterfly closures, safety pins, plasters, fingertip strips, first aid tape, eye pads, and more – all manufactured to ultra‐high standards in a CE‐approved facility.
BS & HSE Compliant: Meets all critical British Standards and HSE guidelines, ensuring reliable and professional medical care in any emergency situation.
description: Product Description GATARN 220 Piece First Aid Kit Perfect for Home, Office, Camping, Car and Sports The GATARN first aid kit is packed with 220 items including antiseptic towels, butterfly closures, safety pins, fingertip strips, first aid tape, eye pads and more. The pockets and pouches are see-through and organised so you can quickly access what you need in seconds. There are also a few extra pockets within the bag so you can add your own essentials such as paracetamol & allergy medication. Featuring durable hard-wearing & water-resistant coating to keep all your essentials protected. Previous page Next page Previous page Next page
